fields.explainZh: 指Kubernetes集群服务器节点的CPU总核数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of CPU cores of the Kubernetes cluster server node.

fields.explainZh: 指Kubernetes集群服务器节点的总内存。
fields.explainEn: Total memory of the Kubernetes cluster server node.

fields.explainZh: 指Kubernetes集群服务器节点的数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of Kubernetes cluster server nodes.

fields.explainZh: 环境变量的值，当该环境变量依赖于Kubernetes集群中别的配置时，则列出该配置。
fields.explainEn: The value of env parameter, depending on other configuration in kubernetes cluster sometimes.

fields.nameZh: Pod名称：容器名称：变量名称
fields.explainZh: 指Pod容器内部环境变量的名称，为区分唯一性，由Pod名称、容器名称和变量名称拼接而成。
fields.explainEn: Env name in container of the Pod, consisted of pod name, container name and env name.

fields.explainZh: 指Pod内部存储卷的名称，为区分唯一性，由Pod名称和存储卷名称拼接而成。
fields.explainEn: Volume name in Pod, consisted of pod name and volume name.

fields.explainZh: 指Pod内部存储卷的挂载路径。
fields.explainEn: Mounted path of the volume in Pod.
Type of the volume in Pod.
The UID of the namespace.
The name of the namespace.
The label time of the namespace.
The creation time of the namespace.
The status of the namespace.
UID of the node
The name of the node.
The label of the node.
The creation time of the node.
The role of the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点所在主机操作系统的内核版本。
fields.explainEn: The kernel version of the host operating system where the node is located.

fields.explainZh: 节点所在主机操作系统的镜像信息。
fields.explainEn: Image information of the operating system of the host where the node is located.

fields.explainZh: 节点所在主机处理器的架构。
fields.explainEn: The architecture of the host processor where the node resides.

fields.explainZh: 节点上容器运行时的版本信息。
fields.explainEn: Version information of the container runtime on the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点上运行的 kubelet 组件的版本信息。
fields.explainEn: Version information of the kubelet components running on the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点上运行的 kube-proxy 组件的版本信息。
fields.explainEn: Version information of the kube-proxy component running on the node.
The name of the host where the node is located.
The IP address of the host where the node is located.

fields.explainZh: 节点已经就绪并且可以接收工作负载的状态。
fields.explainEn: The node is ready and can receive the status of the workload.
The UID of the node.
The name of the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点可分配总内存大小。
fields.explainEn: The total memory size that the node can allocate.

fields.explainZh: 节点上所有容器内存请求之和。
fields.explainEn: The sum of memory requests for all containers on the node.

fields.explainZh: 容器的内存请求与节点可分配总内存大小的比值。
fields.explainEn: The ratio of the container memory requests to the total allocable memory size of the node.
The memory limit of the container.

fields.explainZh: 容器的内存限制与节点可分配总内存大小的比值。
fields.explainEn: The ratio of the container memory limit to the total allocable memory size of the node.
The total number of CPUs a node can allocate.
The container CPU requests.

fields.explainZh: 容器的CPU请求与节点可分配总CPU数量的比值。
fields.explainEn: The ratio of the container CPU request to the total number of CPUs that the node can allocate.
The container CPU limit.

fields.explainZh: 容器的CPU限制与节点可分配总CPU数量的比值。
fields.explainEn: The ratio of the container CPU limit to the total number of CPUs that can be allocated to the node.
The number of pods in the node.
The total number of PODs that the node can allocate.

fields.explainZh: 节点内pod的数量与节点可分配总数的比值。
fields.explainEn: The ratio of the number of pods in a node to the total number of nodes that can be allocated.
The UID of the node.
The name of the node.
Node memory usage.
Node cpu usage.
Type of event.
The name of the event.
The UID of the event.

fields.explainZh: 事件发生的原因或触发条件。
fields.explainEn: The cause or triggering condition of an event.
Detailed description of the event.

fields.explainZh: 触发事件的源组件的信息，如组件名称、组件类型等。
fields.explainEn: Information about the source component that triggered the event, such as component name, component type, etc.
The number of times the event was triggered.
The time when the event was first triggered.
The last time the event was triggered.
The UID of the persistent volume.
The name of the persistent volume.
Label for persistent volumes.
The creation time of the persistent volume.
The capacity of the persistent volume.

fields.explainZh: 持久卷的访问模式，例如 ReadWriteOnce（单节点读写）、ReadOnlyMany（多节点只读）和 ReadWriteMany（多节点读写）。
fields.explainEn: Access modes for persistent volumes, such as ReadWriteOnce (single-node read-write), ReadOnlyMany (multi-node read-only), and ReadWriteMany (multi-node read-write).
The mode of persistent volumes.

fields.explainZh: 持久卷资源释放策略，即在删除持久卷后如何处理底层存储资源，包括 Retain（保留数据）、Delete（删除数据）和 Recycle（回收数据）。
fields.explainEn: Persistent volume resource release strategy, that is, how to handle the underlying storage resources after deleting the persistent volume, including Retain (retain data), Delete (delete data) and Recycle (recycle data).

fields.explainZh: 表示持久卷当前的生命周期阶段，常见值包括 Pending（等待中）、Bound（已绑定）、Released（已释放）和 Failed（失败）。
fields.explainEn: Indicates the current life cycle stage of the persistent volume. Common values ​​include Pending (waiting), Bound (bound), Released (released), and Failed (failed).
Persistent volume claim.

fields.explainZh: 持久卷使用的存储类名称，存储类定义了持久卷如何进行动态分配和配置。
fields.explainEn: The name of the storage class used by the persistent volume. The storage class defines how the persistent volume is dynamically allocated and configured.
The UID of the storage class.
The name of the storage class.
The label of the storage class.
The creation time of the storage class.

fields.explainZh: 提供动态存储卷的存储后端的名称。
fields.explainEn: Provides the name of the storage backend for the dynamic storage volume.

fields.explainZh: 存储类用于指定动态存储卷的回收策略。
fields.explainEn: Storage classes are used to specify the recycling policy of dynamic storage volumes.

fields.explainZh: 存储类指定动态分配存储卷时的绑定模式。
fields.explainEn: The storage class specifies the binding mode when dynamically allocating storage volumes.
The UID of the persistent volume claim.
The name of the persistent volume claim.

fields.explainZh: 持久卷申领的创建时间。
fields.explainEn: The creation time of the persistent volume claim.

fields.explainZh: 持久卷申领选择器条件，用于选择满足特定标签条件的持久卷进行绑定。
fields.explainEn: Persistent volume claim selector conditions are used to select persistent volumes that meet specific label conditions for binding.

fields.explainZh: 持久卷申领的访问模式，即允许的访问方式。可以是 ReadWriteOnce、ReadOnlyMany 或 ReadWriteMany。
fields.explainEn: The access mode claimed by the persistent volume, that is, the allowed access methods. Can be ReadWriteOnce, ReadOnlyMany, or ReadWriteMany.

fields.explainZh: 持久卷申领所获取的实际存储容量。
fields.explainEn: The actual storage capacity acquired by the persistent volume claim.

fields.explainZh: 持久卷申领当前的生命周期阶段，常见的取值包括 Pending（等待中）、Bound（已绑定）和 Lost（丢失）。
fields.explainEn: The current life cycle stage of the persistent volume claim. Common values ​​include Pending (waiting), Bound (bound) and Lost (lost).
Persistent volume name.

fields.explainZh: 持久卷申领的存储类名称，存储类定义了持久卷如何进行分配和配置。
fields.explainEn: The name of the storage class claimed by the persistent volume. The storage class defines how the persistent volume is allocated and configured.
The UID of the pod.
The name of the Pod.
The namespace to which the Pod belongs.
POD label.
The creation time of the pod.
The name of the node to which the Pod belongs.
The status of the Pod.
The IP of the pod.
The service quality of the pod.
The number of POD restarts.

fields.explainZh: 与Pod关联的持久卷声明的名称。
fields.explainEn: The name of the persistent volume claim associated with the Pod.
The UID of the pod owner.
Pod owner name.
The type of pod owner.
Minimum CPU requirements for POD.
The maximum CPU limit for POD.
Minimum POD memory requirements.
The maximum limit of POD memory.
The number of containers in the POD.
Deployment UID.
The name of the Deployment.
The namespace to which the Deployment belongs.
Deployment label.
The creation time of the Deployment.
Deployment strategy.

fields.explainZh: 与Deployment关联的持久卷声明的名称。
fields.explainEn: The name of the persistent volume claim associated with the Deployment.

fields.explainZh: 用于选择控制器管理的Deployment的标签选择器。
fields.explainEn: Tag selector for selecting Deployment managed by the controller.
The specified number of copies.
Replica Sets UID.
The name of the Replica Sets.
The namespace to which the Replica Sets belongs.
Replica Sets label.
The creation time of the Replica Sets.

fields.explainZh: 与Replica Sets关联的持久卷声明的名称。
fields.explainEn: The name of the persistent volume claim associated with the Replica Sets.

fields.explainZh: 用于选择控制器管理的Replica Sets的标签选择器。
fields.explainEn: Tag selector for selecting Replica Sets managed by the controller.
The specified number of copies.
Daemon Sets UID.
The name of the Daemon Sets.
The namespace to which the Daemon Sets belongs.
Daemon Sets label.
The creation time of the Daemon Sets.

fields.explainZh: 与Daemon Sets关联的持久卷声明的名称。
fields.explainEn: The name of the persistent volume claim associated with the Daemon Sets.

fields.explainZh: 用于选择控制器管理的Daemon Sets的标签选择器。
fields.explainEn: Tag selector for selecting Daemon Sets managed by the controller.
The number of Daemon Sets running.
The desired number of Daemon Sets.
Stateful Sets UID.
The name of the Stateful Sets.
The namespace to which the Stateful Sets belongs.
Stateful Sets label.
The creation time of the Stateful Sets.

fields.explainZh: 与Stateful Sets关联的持久卷声明的名称。
fields.explainEn: The name of the persistent volume claim associated with the Stateful Sets.

fields.explainZh: 用于选择控制器管理的Stateful Sets的标签选择器。
fields.explainEn: Tag selector for selecting Stateful Sets managed by the controller.
The specified number of copies.
Job UID.
The name of the job.
The namespace to which the Job belongs.
Job label.
Job creation time.

fields.explainZh: 与Job关联的持久卷声明的名称。
fields.explainEn: The name of the persistent volume claim associated with the Job.

fields.explainZh: 允许Job同时运行的最大数量。
fields.explainEn: The maximum number of jobs allowed to run simultaneously.
The minimum quantity that the JOB needs to complete.
Job start time.
Job end time.
The number of successfully completed JOBs.
Number of failed JObs.
UID of CronJOB.
The name of the CronJOB.
The namespace to which CronJOB belongs.
CronJOB tag.
Creation time of CronJOB.

fields.explainZh: 与Pod关联的持久卷声明的名称。
fields.explainEn: The name of the persistent volume claim associated with the Pod.
Cron expression for CronJob runtime.
Running CronJob number.
The last time the CronJob ran successfully.

fields.explainZh: 用于指定 CronJob 的并发策略，主要用来控制当上一个作业还在运行时，下一个作业是否要启动。
fields.explainEn: Used to specify the concurrency strategy of CronJob, mainly used to control whether the next job should be started while the previous job is still running.
ID.
The name of the container.
The UID of the pod to which the container belongs.
The number of container restarts.
Minimum CPU size requested for the container.
The maximum CPU size limit for the container.

fields.explainZh: 容器的内存大小最小请求。
fields.explainEn: The minimum memory size requested for the container.

fields.explainZh: 容器的内存大小最大限制。
fields.explainEn: The maximum memory size limit of the container.
Container startup command.
Parameters to start the command.
UID of Services.
The name of the service.
The namespace to which Services belongs.
Services label.
The creation time of the Service.

fields.explainZh: 用于选择控制器管理的Pod的标签选择器。
fields.explainEn: Tag selector for selecting Pods managed by the controller.

fields.explainZh: 指定服务的类型，例如 ClusterIP、NodePort、LoadBalancer等。
fields.explainEn: Specify the type of service, such as ClusterIP, NodePort, LoadBalancer, etc.
The IP of the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 用于指定客户端会话关联的策略。
fields.explainEn: Policy used to specify client session association.
UID of the pod.
The name of the Pod.
Namespace of the pod.
The memory usage of the Pod.
The CPU usage of the Pod.
EndPoints UID
EndPoints name
The namespace to which EndPoints belongs
EndPoints tags
Creation time of EndPoints

fields.explainZh: 与该服务关联的后端 Pod 的 IP 地址。
fields.explainEn: The IP address of the backend Pod associated with this service.

fields.explainZh: 服务相关联的处于未就绪状态的后端 Pod 的 IP 地址。
fields.explainEn: The IP address of the backend Pod associated with the service that is in a not-ready state.

fields.explainZh: 用于表示与服务关联的端口信息。
fields.explainEn: Used to represent port information associated with the service.
ID.
UID of EndPoints.
The name of the EndPoints.
The namespace to which EndPoints belongs.

fields.explainZh: 与服务相关联的后端Pod的引用对象UID。
fields.explainEn: The reference object UID of the backend Pod associated with the service.

fields.explainZh: 与服务相关联的后端Pod的引用对象类型。
fields.explainEn: The reference object type of the backend Pod associated with the service.

fields.explainZh: 与服务相关联的后端Pod的引用对象名称。
fields.explainEn: The reference object name of the backend Pod associated with the service.

fields.explainZh: 与服务相关联的后端Pod的引用对象所属命名空间。
fields.explainEn: The namespace to which the reference object of the backend Pod associated with the service belongs.
Reference object ready status.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
